---
title: "P2.02 — Avicenna (placeholder)"
problem-id: 2
status: draft
difficulty: 4
topics: [organic]
date: "2026-05-18"
description: "Placeholder. Replace with the real Problem 02 (Avicenna) content from PART2_split."
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Status: Draft.** Internally cross-checked, not yet peer-reviewed. Errors likely.
:::

> Body to be migrated from `PART2_split/Problem_02_Avicenna - with Key and Analysis.md`.
